message:
🐛 Fix MediaKit.ensureInitialized + add Watch Fullscreen button

- Re-add MediaKit.ensureInitialized() to main.dart (was reverted by agent)
- Add Watch Fullscreen button below now-playing info panel
- Single-tap on video preview also goes fullscreen
- Fuzzy search in EPG mappings (tokenized keyword matching)
- EPG refresh service with free XMLTV sources
- Channel info overlay with resolution badge and buffering sparkline

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
